sentence: 节日晚会上有精彩的歌舞表演。
pinyin: Jié rì wǎn huì shàng yǒu jīng cǎi de gē wǔ biǎo yǎn.
english: There were wonderful singing and dancing performances at the holiday show.

sentence: 经济萧条时期，很多店铺关门了。
pinyin: Jīngjì xiāotiáo shíqī, hěn duō diànpù guānmén le.
english: During the economic slump, many shops closed down.

sentence: 她试穿婚纱的时候激动得哭了。
pinyin: Tā shì chuān hūnshā de shíhòu jīdòng de kū le.
english: She burst into tears with excitement when she tried on the wedding dress.

sentence: 她匆匆吃完早饭就出门了。
pinyin: Tā cōngcōng chī wán zǎofàn jiù chūmén le.
english: She hurriedly finished breakfast and headed out the door.

sentence: 公司的层级太多，审批很慢。
pinyin: Gōngsī de cénjí tài duō, shěnpī hěn màn.
english: The company has too many levels of hierarchy, which makes approvals slow.
